The '''Vulkar shock stick''' was a basic [[Stun baton/Legends|stun baton]], charged at a higher frequency to make it cause decent physical damage. It was carried primarily by members of the [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkars]] on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] around the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. It focused electrical pulses around the baton, thereby causing intense wounds.

{{Weapon-stub}}
